title: Slumbering Beetle
move_pattern: Starts with Snore. After Snore, checks if SlumberPower is still present: if yes, repeats Snore; if no (woken up), uses Roll Out and then keeps repeating Roll Out forever.
notes: Starts asleep with Slumber power (3 stacks). While Slumber is active it only Snores. Once woken up (Slumber removed), it gains Roll Out and loops that move gaining 2 Strength each time. On wake-up, Plating power is removed. Plating on spawn is 18 at ascension (ToughEnemies), base 15.
